news.title:
Nifty 50 enters technical correction, down 10.1% from Jan 5 peak of 26,373.2 to 23,697 on Mar 9.
Wipro falls 26%, Jio Financial Services 24%, Asian Paints 23%. ONGC rises 16%, Bharat Electronics gains 9%.
news.summary:
Nifty 50 enters technical correction, down 10.1% from Jan 5 peak of 26,373.2 to 23,697 on Mar 9.
Wipro falls 26%, Jio Financial Services 24%, Asian Paints 23%. ONGC rises 16%, Bharat Electronics gains 9%.

news.title:
Paint stocks like Asian Paints, Berger Paints fell amid crude oil surge to $120.
Rising oil prices increase input costs, pressure margins, affecting investor sentiment.
news.summary:
Paint stocks like Asian Paints, Berger Paints fell amid crude oil surge to $120.
Rising oil prices increase input costs, pressure margins, affecting investor sentiment.

news.title:
Asian Paints and peers drop up to 5% as crude oil spikes 29%.
Oil prices surpass $110/barrel, rising sharply amid Mideast tensions.
news.summary:
Asian Paints and peers drop up to 5% as crude oil spikes 29%.
Oil prices surpass $110/barrel, rising sharply amid Mideast tensions.

news.title:
HSBC on paints: Asian Paints' target price cut to ₹2,600, Berger Paints to ₹500.
Price hikes may reduce volume-value gap; both stocks rated 'hold'.
news.summary:
HSBC on paints: Asian Paints' target price cut to ₹2,600, Berger Paints to ₹500.
Price hikes may reduce volume-value gap; both stocks rated 'hold'.

news.title:
CLSA warns Asian Paints, HUL, and Godrej Consumer may need steep price hikes if crude stays high.
ITC, Nestlé India, and Colgate India may require smaller hikes; high crude costs could pressure margins.
news.summary:
CLSA warns Asian Paints, HUL, and Godrej Consumer may need steep price hikes if crude stays high.
ITC, Nestlé India, and Colgate India may require smaller hikes; high crude costs could pressure margins.

news.title:
Paintmakers foresee intense competition, pricing pressures but expect Q4 demand recovery with volume growth.
Leading manufacturers like Asian Paints, Berger Paints, Kansai Nerolac aim to sustain margins amid challenges.
news.summary:
Paintmakers foresee intense competition, pricing pressures but expect Q4 demand recovery with volume growth.
Leading manufacturers like Asian Paints, Berger Paints, Kansai Nerolac aim to sustain margins amid challenges.

news.title:
Smiti Holding disclosed inter se transfer of Asian Paints shares under SEBI SAST Regulation 29(2).
3,25,000 shares (0.034%) transferred via block deal; promoter group's aggregate holding remains unchanged.
news.summary:
Smiti Holding disclosed inter se transfer of Asian Paints shares under SEBI SAST Regulation 29(2).
3,25,000 shares (0.034%) transferred via block deal; promoter group's aggregate holding remains unchanged.

news.title:
Asian Paints focuses on regionalisation and waterproofing solutions to boost growth amid rising competition from Birla Opus and JSW Paints.
Despite Q3 profit falling 4.6%, India decorative business grew 8%. Marketing and premiumisation remain key priorities for Asian Paints.
news.summary:
Asian Paints focuses on regionalisation and waterproofing solutions to boost growth amid rising competition from Birla Opus and JSW Paints.
Despite Q3 profit falling 4.6%, India decorative business grew 8%. Marketing and premiumisation remain key priorities for Asian Paints.

news.title:
Asian Paints faces headwinds as weak Q3 results lead to a 10% drop since Jan 27.
Extended monsoon, shorter festive period, and competition dampen near-term outlook.
news.summary:
Asian Paints faces headwinds as weak Q3 results lead to a 10% drop since Jan 27.
Extended monsoon, shorter festive period, and competition dampen near-term outlook.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley sees multi-year de-rating in paint stocks like Asian Paints, Berger Paints, and Kansai Nerolac.
Target prices suggest downsides of 11% for Asian Paints, 17.6% for Berger, and 7.5% for Kansai Nerolac.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley sees multi-year de-rating in paint stocks like Asian Paints, Berger Paints, and Kansai Nerolac.
Target prices suggest downsides of 11% for Asian Paints, 17.6% for Berger, and 7.5% for Kansai Nerolac.

news.title:
Asian Paints executed a block trade of ~257,483 shares at Rs. 2,380.
The transaction value for the trade totaled Rs. 61.3 crore.
news.summary:
Asian Paints executed a block trade of ~257,483 shares at Rs. 2,380.
The transaction value for the trade totaled Rs. 61.3 crore.

news.title:
Sensex rose 487 pts to 82,345; Nifty gained 167 pts to 25,343, driven by earnings, oil price rise, and order wins.
BEL surged 9% on profit jump; ONGC, Oil India up 9% each. Maruti, Hindustan Zinc, Asian Paints, CSB Bank lagged.
news.summary:
Sensex rose 487 pts to 82,345; Nifty gained 167 pts to 25,343, driven by earnings, oil price rise, and order wins.
BEL surged 9% on profit jump; ONGC, Oil India up 9% each. Maruti, Hindustan Zinc, Asian Paints, CSB Bank lagged.

news.title:
Asian Paints reaffirms its PBDIT margin target of 18-20%, driven by robust cost strategies.
The margin focus is supported by material innovations, not lower competition or external deflation.
news.summary:
Asian Paints reaffirms its PBDIT margin target of 18-20%, driven by robust cost strategies.
The margin focus is supported by material innovations, not lower competition or external deflation.

news.title:
Asian Paints expects 8-10% volume growth in Q4 and beyond.
Industrial and B2B sectors to grow faster; Bangladesh slowdown expected.
news.summary:
Asian Paints expects 8-10% volume growth in Q4 and beyond.
Industrial and B2B sectors to grow faster; Bangladesh slowdown expected.

news.title: Analysts maintain a bearish outlook on Asian Paints, leading to a downgrade.
news.summary: Analysts maintain a bearish outlook on Asian Paints, leading to a downgrade.

news.title: Citi retains Sell rating on Asian Paints, raises target price to ₹2,300.
news.summary: Citi retains Sell rating on Asian Paints, raises target price to ₹2,300.

news.title:
Jefferies retains a buy rating on Asian Paints with a target of ₹3,300.
Domestic volume grew 8% YoY but consolidated revenue rose half as much.
news.summary:
Jefferies retains a buy rating on Asian Paints with a target of ₹3,300.
Domestic volume grew 8% YoY but consolidated revenue rose half as much.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley retains Underweight rating on Asian Paints due to slower growth.
The rating also reflects ongoing competitive challenges faced by the company.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley retains Underweight rating on Asian Paints due to slower growth.
The rating also reflects ongoing competitive challenges faced by the company.

news.title:
Asian Paints uploaded Q3 and 9M FY26 investor conference audio, covering business and financials till Dec 31, 2025.
Transcript will soon be available on the company website as per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
Asian Paints uploaded Q3 and 9M FY26 investor conference audio, covering business and financials till Dec 31, 2025.

news.title: Asian Paints reports persistent weakness in demand, indicating slow growth.
